title: Tracing Agentic Failure from the Flow of Success
innovation_summary: Tracing Agentic Failure from the Flow of Success: We propose OAT, which casts this problem as one-class learning with neural controlled differential equations, modeling the dynamical pattern of successful trajectories in latent space.
